title: vitis trifoliata var. tuberculata
intro: Vitis trifoliata var. tuberculata, also known as the Chinese grapevine or Chinese wild grape, is a species of flowering plant in the grape family (Vitaceae). This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis trifoliata var. tuberculata include reducing fever, relieving sore throats and coughs, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed as teas or added to traditional remedies for various health conditions.
